title: Started new vlog channel, Kyle Pounds Vlogs

enrichment.summary: Kyle announces he is creating two separate channels: one for streaming content and one for vlogs, keeping his main channel exclusively for philosophy videos and request-based talking videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to separate vlogs and streams from his main channel to keep it focused on philosophy and request videos

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going? So I have announcements to make because I did a video before that said
I'm going to start a new channel called Streaming. So if you see any one of my streamings from now
On, it has to be on my streaming channel. And also, I think I'm going to make a vlogging channel
Because that's different from my normal stuff. I'm going to keep my regular original channel
For when I do philosophy videos and requests and stuff. And then just break off, get in
Modern times with the new vlogs. Okay, so I'm done. That vlog I did earlier today, that's
It, man. From now on, when I do a video on this channel, it's going to be a talking video.
Ba-boom-boom. Okay? All right. Peace out.
